title: Replenish Enchantment
description: Add new enchantment "Replenish"! The hoe will help you plant the crop. Also avoid you from breaking crops that isn't fully grown while holding hoes. (= crop replanting)
body:
This mod simply add an enchantment: "Replenish". With that, plants are automatically planted and you won't have to plant it by yourself.

FAQ
---

<details>
<summary>How do I get this enchantment?</summary>

By enchanting hoe on enchant tables.

</details>

<details>
<summary>What if I breaking crops too fast and misbreak the new crop?</summary>

This mod will also prevent you from breaking crops that isn't fully grown if you're holding hoes.

</details>


(26.1 Fabric is out)
